axisCountsAfterP61.note: P61 is an Axis B artifact-only round — counts toward Axis B, resets consecutive Axis A streak

sourceReviewMatrix.pitBlockCondition: date is null, undefined, or whitespace
sourceReviewMatrix.eligibilityNote: Quote is eligible as a structural input for Axis B review. P53/P39 already classified it as SIMULATION_INPUT_ELIGIBLE. PIT gate is reliable when date is non-null.
sourceReviewMatrix.allowedUse: structural input eligibility review only — paper artifact

sourceReviewMatrix.pitGate: date non-null AND pitSafetyJson non-null (dual gate)
sourceReviewMatrix.pitBlockCondition: date is null/whitespace OR pitSafetyJson is null/undefined
sourceReviewMatrix.eligibilityNote: Regime is eligible as a structural input for Axis B review. P53/P39 classified it as SIMULATION_INPUT_ELIGIBLE. Dual PIT gate (date + pitSafetyJson) provides strong PIT safety.
sourceReviewMatrix.allowedUse: structural input eligibility review only — paper artifact

sourceReviewMatrix.pitGate: year+month finite numbers (required); releaseDate presence determines PIT confidence
sourceReviewMatrix.eligibilityNote: MonthlyRevenue is eligible for Axis B review but carries a LOW_CONFIDENCE_PIT_INFERRED flag when releaseDate is null. Adapter never returns null for valid year+month, but PIT confidence degrades without releaseDate. Axis B review must propagate this warning.
sourceReviewMatrix.allowedUse: structural input eligibility review with LOW_CONFIDENCE_PIT_INFERRED warning propagated
